rulings.Case Title: WHINERY VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, IF MOVANT PROVIDES PROOF OF SERVICE AND EXPLAINS TIMELINESS. OTHERWISE, OFF CALENDAR.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

rulings.Case Title: SHAWN CORP VS HINMAN & CARMICHAEL LLP
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Amend Complaint To Add Plaintiff Aasim Enterprises Inc; P&A; Decl Of Ashraf Ali; Decl Of Lawrence Bernheim; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, SEE KLOPSTOCK V. SUPERIOR COURT, (1941) 17 CAL.2D 13; CLOUD V. NORTHROP GRUMAN CORP., (1998) 67 CAL.APP.4TH 995 AND PASADENA HOSPITAL ASSN V. SUPERIOR COURT 204 CAL.APP.3D 1031. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: CASTILLO VS CCSF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Consolidate (With Case No. 324039) ; P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE BUT ORDER PARTIES TO COORDINATE DISCOVERY BEFORE COMMISSIONER SO DUPLICATE DISCOVERY IS NOT CONDUCTED. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: WOLFE VS BERKOWITZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer And Motion To Strike 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR "BAD FAITH BREACHES OF CONFIDENTIAL AND FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP." NO FIDUCIARY DUTY ESTABLISHED. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND DECEIT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE DEMURRER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: KEN LEUNG CONSTRUCTION VS DANCING DAYS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Amended Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: RB HOWE, L.P. VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE METHOD OF DEDUCTION RE MAKE WHOLE BROKERAGE FEE AND TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE ENFORCEABILITY OF SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT. (RC)

rulings.Case Title: DE ETTA NICHOLS VS. A P GREEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Transfer Venue
rulings.Rulings: DENY IN INTEREST OF JUSTICE NO SHOWING BY DEFENDANTS THAT TRIAL WILL OCCUR IN ORANGE COUNTY ON OR BEFORE JULY 1, 2002. MOTION BROUGHT TOO LATE. (CW)

rulings.Rulings: JOP - GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE AN EXPRESS ASSUMPTION OF CONTRACT AND FAILURE TO DISCLOSE PRINCIPAL. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARY HART VS. KENNETH LAVERY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award C.C.P. Sections 1285 Et Seq.
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM JOSEPH TYMA VS. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OF THE STATE OF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Alternative Writ Of Mandamus And/Or Order To Show Cause
rulings.Rulings: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DMV HAS JURISDICTION TO REVOKE PETITIONER'S LICENSE. HOWEVER, THE COURT ALSO FINDS THE DMV'S FINDINGS OF FACT ERRONEOUS AS THEY STATE THAT PETITIONER WAS ARRESTED FOR VIOLATIONS OF THE CALIFORNIA VEHICLE CODE, WHEN THE RECORDS CLEARLY INDICATES THAT HE WAS ARRESTED FOR VIOLATION OF THE FEDERAL CODE OF REGULATIONS. THE COURT REMANDS THE MATTER TO THE DMV TO CLARIFY ITS FINDINGS OF FACT BASED UPON THE EXISTING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL SHEAHAN VS. BERNARD MANGIONE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: PAULINE MENSING VS. PETER TURNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Exparte Order Advancing Demurrer Hearing Date From 5/20/02 To 5/2/02
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. NOTICE ADEQUATE. UNLAWFUL DETAINER COMPLAINT NEED NOT STATE WHETHER CONTRACT ORAL OR WRITTEN. (CW)
